svg.text: SELF-VERIFICATION JUDGE (before every write — and especially every payment)
“Is this grounded in the ledger? Do the numbers tie out? Within policy & limits? Not a duplicate?” → PASS: commit / queue approval · FAIL: regenerate · then escalate — no payment is ever autonomous

svg.text: ① MCP-first — every capability is a tool; the same tools power web, Excel, Slack & email.
② Grounded in the ledger — every number ties out; no hallucinated figures.
③ Approval on every commitment — no autonomous payments; maker-checker, always.
④ Idempotent & controlled — idempotency keys prevent double-payments; segregation of duties.
⑤ Model tiering + caching → low cost; eval-gated, tie-out-tested reliability.
⑥ Everything audited — the immutable audit_log is the system of record. Not financial advice.
